warp.name: mihu-farm
warp.desc: Mega farm for crops and resources - maintained regularly.

rules.text: Any tool you took from the Player Warp must be returned
rules.note: Unless you have serious reasons for keeping it

rules.text: Any donations are welcome; you will be placed on a wall of fame
rules.note: You will need at least Ranger rank to be verified

rules.text: Don't break anything except the crops and always replant them
rules.note: Make sure to use a hoe/item that auto-replants; Demeters Touch is available in the basement.
